case_number: Crl. Misc. Application No. S-28 of 2024

chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No. S-28 of 2024 (Malhar Soomro Vs. The State & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on office objections. 2. For Orders on MA No. 330/2024 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case. 25-03-2024. Mr. Sundar Khan Chachar advocate for the applicant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional P.G for the State. ******** 1. Over ruled. 2. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. Detenue Mst. Sumera is produced by SHO PS Qadirpur; it is stated by her that she and her sister Mst. Suhana alias Toti were abducted by accused Ali Hassan and others and now she wants to go with her father Malhar. Her statement to such effect is also recorded by said SHO, it is taken on record. Mst. Sumera being sui juris is set free to go with her father/the applicant. The instant Crl. Misc. Application u/s 491 Cr.P.C is disposed of accordingly. Judge Nasim /P.A
